findingDetails.title: Listed child phase 000-release-cleanup is not an executable spec folder
findingDetails.evidence: Parent phase map and metadata list 000-release-cleanup as a child, but the subtree contains only .gitkeep placeholders.
findingDetails.recommendation: Either remove 000-release-cleanup from child metadata/phase map or scaffold it with spec.md, description.json, and graph-metadata.json.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked parent spec, description child list, graph child list, and 000-release-cleanup file inventory.

title: Listed child phase 000-release-cleanup is not an executable spec folder
claim: Parent metadata lists 000-release-cleanup as a child phase even though the folder lacks child spec metadata.
recommendation: Remove or fully scaffold the placeholder child and clarify whether it is executable.
scopeProof: Parent phase-map and child metadata comparison plus file inventory.

rationale: Listed child is not independently executable.
